_note: Phone numbers keyed by the role set they are assigned to. Because the unified app redirects by priority (state_client > state_farmer > regular_farmer > regular_client), a role's module tests should prefer a SINGLE-role number so login lands directly on that role's home. Reserve multi-role numbers for exercising the in-app switch. mpin is the 4-digit MPIN for that number.

multi_role._note: Numbers assigned to more than one role — use these to test the switch toggle. `roles` lists every role the number can reach; login will land on the highest-priority one.
